modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks non-English as their first language.
You should write the description in a mixed and uneven structure and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be several noticeable typos and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Faculty color printing and laminating options on campus.

full_description_text: Faculty want to know about color printing options. They ask about campus printing and also laminating. There is confusion about what is available. Need clear info on this.
short_description: Faculty color printing and laminating options on campus.
description: Faculty want to know about color printing options. They ask about campus printing and also laminating. There is confusion about what is available. Need clear info on this.
